mapper.select: select count(*) from ${tableName} where DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{stime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{etime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

select uidentify, INDEX_CODE, TIME,VALUE from ${tableName} where DATE(TIME) >= DATE(#{stime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE(TIME) <= DATE(#{etime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and index_code in ('2125','2126','2127','2128','2129','2130','2131')
